purpose: Record the hand-sketch complement-readable lift conjecture after the guarded 900-state lift search.
boundary: This does not close Gap A.
This does not prove full G900.
The complement rule is not yet executable proof.
No independent witness layer is proven.

hand_sketch_observations.local_frame_reading: A appears as a hinge/read cell; B and C appear as neighboring carrier cells or directional exits.
hand_sketch_observations.seam_reading: The mark may have two valid readings depending on which side of the seam reads it.
hand_sketch_observations.word_layer_seen: L/R handedness words appear as a possible return-word layer.

conjecture.name: Complement-Readable Lift Conjecture
conjecture.short_form: The lift is not from 120 to 900 by counting. The lift is through complement-readable return.
conjecture.statement: Anchor-and-reverse transport on the 120-record source-shell carrier may be the visible shadow of a complement-readable lift. At the 120-record layer, reversal appears as B <-> C across a shared length-2 path. At the lifted layer, reversal may be governed by a complement seam i <-> 41-i, together with an L/R handedness word recording how the local frame crosses neighboring carrier cells.

current_shadow.source_reading: anchor-and-reverse transport on oriented length-2 source-shell records
current_shadow.combined_meaning: within an anchor bucket, vary outgoing two-step records; by reversal, move the anchor to the opposite endpoint; repeat

why_this_is_not_yet_a_lift: No explicit 120-record to 900-state map has been constructed.
No full 900-state return cycle has been found.
No independent witness layer has been found.
No source-native WXYZTI generator has been derived.
The complement rule is hand-sketched, not audited.
conjecture.first_executable_test: Test whether the admitted four can be assigned complement-readable seams, reverse partners, and L/R word classes without contradiction.

summary.short_form: The lift is not from 120 to 900 by counting. The lift is through complement-readable return.
summary.anchor_reverse_source_reading: anchor-and-reverse transport on oriented length-2 source-shell records
summary.terminal_reason: The hand sketch supplies a complement-readable lift conjecture, not a proof. It suggests a possible missing 120-to-900 lift mechanism but does not construct the lift.

keeper_lines: The lift is not from 120 to 900 by counting.
The lift is through complement-readable return.
A mark may return with two readings: i from one side, 41-i from the other.
Anchor-and-reverse transport may be the 120-record shadow of complement-readable transport.
Neighbor overdrive may occur when adjacent carrier cells share a complement-readable seam.
The L/R word may be the missing return-word layer.
This is a conjecture, not a proof.
positive_results: A concrete complement rule candidate was identified: i -> 41 - i.
The conjecture connects the hand sketch to anchor-and-reverse transport.
The conjecture gives a more specific target for a 120-to-900 lift map.
The conjecture suggests L/R handedness words as a possible witness layer.
negative_results: No full 900-state return cycle was found.
No independent witness layer was found.
No source-native WXYZTI generator was derived.
blocked_promotions: Do not call the complement rule proven.
Do not call this full G900.
Do not call this Gap A closure.
Do not treat hand sketches as audited artifacts without executable tests.
allowed_next_work: Test complement-readable assignments on the admitted four.
Build a small executable complement-seam model using i -> 41-i.
Search L/R return-word classes for the admitted records.
Search for a 120-to-900 lift map using anchor, complement side, and L/R word fields.

interpretation.main_result: A complement-readable lift conjecture was recorded.
interpretation.why_this_matters: It gives the missing lift problem a concrete form: complement seam plus handedness word, rather than raw state multiplication.
interpretation.why_not_closure: The conjecture does not construct the 120-to-900 map, return cycle, independent witness, or WXYZTI generator.
interpretation.next_move: Run the first executable test: complement-readable assignments for the admitted four.

claim.short_form: The lift is not from 120 to 900 by counting. The lift is through complement-readable return.
claim.not_closed_reason: The conjecture does not construct the 120-to-900 map, return cycle, independent witness, or WXYZTI generator.
claim.next_problem: Run the first executable test: complement-readable assignments for the admitted four.
